summary: Comprehensive regression testing after major refactoring. Backend server.py (1936 lines) split into modular architecture and frontend MenuPage.jsx (1402 lines) split into components. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified working - login, dashboard, menu page with categories/items, orders page with 3 tabs, public menu.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status with timestamp
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/220066 - returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token - returns user data
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without token - returns 401
Backend: GET /api/restaurants - returns list of 2 restaurants
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id} - returns restaurant details
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/categories - returns categories
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-sections - returns sections
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items - returns menu items
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/labels - returns labels
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/tables - returns tables with preorder flag
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/orders - returns orders including preorders
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/staff-calls - returns staff calls
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/call-types - returns call types
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/orders/complete-all - works correctly
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/staff-calls/complete-all - works correctly
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/settings - returns settings
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/analytics - returns analytics data
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/employees - returns employees
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{table_code} - returns public menu
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{preorder_table_code} - returns is_preorder=true
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/INVALID - returns 404
Backend: POST /api/public/orders - creates order
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls - creates staff call
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot - returns bot info
Backend: GET /api/users - returns users list
Frontend: Login page loads with Russian placeholders (Введите логин, Введите пароль)
Frontend: Login with admin/220066 works, redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows restaurant info, stats cards, quick actions
Frontend: Menu page loads with data-testid='menu-page'
Frontend: Menu page shows Categories sidebar with items count
Frontend: Menu page shows SortableCategoryItem components with drag handles
Frontend: Menu page shows SortableMenuItem components with prices, images
Frontend: Menu page shows action buttons (Категория, Баннер, Позиция, Импорт меню, Ярлыки)
Frontend: Orders page loads with 3 tabs (Заказы, Предзаказы, Вызовы)
Frontend: Orders tab shows orders with status badges and prices
Frontend: Preorders tab shows preorders with customer name, phone, date/time
Frontend: Calls tab shows staff calls with types
Frontend: Public menu loads for table code 697DCAA5
Frontend: Public menu shows menu sections, categories, items with prices
seed_data_creation: Test order and staff call created during testing via public API endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring completed successfully. Backend modularized into: routes/ (auth.py, restaurants.py, menu.py, tables.py, orders.py, settings.py, public.py, telegram.py, seed.py), services/ (images.py, telegram.py), database.py, models.py, auth.py, helpers.py. Frontend MenuPage.jsx modularized into: components/menu/ (SortableCategoryItem.jsx, SortableMenuItem.jsx, MenuDialogs.jsx, ImageUpload.jsx). All API endpoints verified working. Test credentials: admin/220066, restaurant_id: aa25189d-d668-4838-915a-c5d936547f3f, preorder_table: 6E32830E, regular_table: 697DCAA5.

backend_modules_verified: routes/menu.py - sections, categories, items, labels, import, upload
routes/orders.py - orders, staff calls, call types, complete-all
routes/public.py - public menu, orders, staff calls
frontend_components_verified: MenuPage.jsx - Main menu page using extracted components
components/menu/SortableCategoryItem.jsx - Category item with drag, edit, delete, toggles
components/menu/SortableMenuItem.jsx - Menu item and banner with drag, edit, delete
components/menu/MenuDialogs.jsx - All dialog components (Category, Item, Delete, Import, Label)
